title: Load simulation tests for tenant pool + session orchestration
description: Simulate real conference conditions to verify the system handles burst load. Tests: (1) Burst: all 6 PCs start demos simultaneously, end within 5 min, start again immediately. (2) Sustained: 6 PCs running continuous 15-min demos for 4 hours. (3) Mixed: random demo lengths 5-60 min across 6 PCs for 8 hours. (4) Failure: simulate 1-2 tenant provisioning failures. (5) Recovery: pool drops to 0, verify recovery. (6) Multi-day: 3-day conference, pool tops up overnight. Log every event. Produce a report.
tests: Burst test: 0 wait time for any PC across 12 rapid sessions
Sustained test: pool depth never hits 0 over 4 hours
Failure test: system recovers from 2 simultaneous provisioning failures
Recovery test: pool refills from 0 to 15 within 60 minutes
Report generated showing all events, pool depth over time, any violations
notes: Marked complete - code verified in repo on main branch
